Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}If I can make a suggestion, how about we go to Paulownia Mall?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I hear the lights and decorations there are absolutely beautiful.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I decided to spend[n]Christmas Eve with Chihiro...[n]{f 1 1}
